zh.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾希布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Vernon於大約1113年出生在英國爾諾維其時，他的父親William FitzRichard de Vernon23歲，母親Lucy Tancarville25歲。他和Margaret de Knightley至少有1個兒子。他於1164年住在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。他去世於1174年之後，埋葬在英國爾切斯特。

zh-hans.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Vernon于大约1113年出生在英国爾諾維其时，他的父亲William FitzRichard de Vernon23岁，母亲Lucy Tancarville25岁。他和Margaret de Knightley至少有1个儿子。他于1164年住在英国英格兰爾切斯特。他去世于1174年之后，埋葬在英国爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Vernon was born about 1113, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, his father, William FitzRichard de Vernon, was 23 and his mother, Lucy Tancarville, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Margaret de Knightley. He lived in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1164. He died after 1174, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Vernon est né environ 1113, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William FitzRichard de Vernon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lucy Tancarville, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret de Knightley. Il a vécu à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1164. Il est décédé après 1174, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Vernon um 1113 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzRichard de Vernon 23 und seine Mutter Lucy Tancarville 25. Er hatte mit Margaret de Knightley mindestens 1 Sohn. 1164 hat er in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb nach 1174 und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Vernon è nato il circa 1113 nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William FitzRichard de Vernon, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Tancarville, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret de Knightley. Vissuto a Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1164. Morì dopo il 1174, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vernonが約1113年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父William FitzRichard de Vernonは23歳，母Lucy Tancarvilleは25歳であった。彼はMargaret de Knightleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1164年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターに住んでいた。彼は1174年以後に死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vernon(이)가 대략 1113년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzRichard de Vernon(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Tancarville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margaret de Knightley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1164년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 살았다. 그는 1174년 이후 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1113, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Tancarville, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret de Knightley. Ele viveu em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1164. Ele faleceu após 1174, e foi sepultado em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Vernon родился около 1113 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William FitzRichard de Vernon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Tancarville, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret de Knightley. Он жил в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1164 году. Он умер после 1174 г. и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1113, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lucy Tancarville, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret de Knightley. Vivió en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1164. Murió después de 1174, y fue sepultado en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
